name: FinTech
description: Financial technology innovations including digital payments, blockchain, and digital currencies

name: Process Improvement
description: Innovations that improve efficiency, reduce costs, or enhance the quality of banking processes

name: Technology
description: Technology-driven innovations including AI, biometrics, cybersecurity, and infrastructure modernisation

name: Product Innovation
description: New or enhanced banking products and services for customers and stakeholders

name: Customer Experience
description: Innovations focused on improving customer service, engagement, and satisfaction

name: Sustainability
description: Green banking, environmental sustainability, and socially responsible innovations

name: Legacy Systems
description: Innovations related to modernising or replacing legacy banking systems
